descriptions.zh: 在一次协调器的任务分解与委派运行中，系统将工作者可用性（WorkerAvailability）记录为 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment produces WorkerAvailability 的目标端点。其已审查定义是“作为状态，工作者可用性由这一事实区分：它记录工作者或子智能体是否能接收工作，包括负载、生命周期状态、能力就绪情况和备选状态”。记录同时写入经审查字段 availability_assessment_id="WorkerAvailabilityAssessment:001", worker_role_id="WorkerRole:007", availability_status="available", load_ratio=0.35, assessed_at="2026-07-15T01:10:00Z", valid_until="2026-07-15T01:20:00Z", reason="capacity and concurrency are available"。
descriptions.en: During a coordinator run for task decomposition and delegation, the system records worker availability (WorkerAvailability) as the target of WorkerAvailabilityAssessment produces WorkerAvailability. Its reviewed definition is “Worker availability belongs to the state category and differs from broader members in that it records whether a worker or subagent can accept work, including load, lifecycle state, capability readiness, and fallback status”. The record also binds reviewed fields availability_assessment_id="WorkerAvailabilityAssessment:001", worker_role_id="WorkerRole:007", availability_status="available", load_ratio=0.35, assessed_at="2026-07-15T01:10:00Z", valid_until="2026-07-15T01:20:00Z", reason="capacity and concurrency are available".
descriptions.ja: コーディネーターによるタスク分解と委任の実行では、システムは作業者可用性（WorkerAvailability）を WorkerAvailabilityAssessment produces WorkerAvailability の終点として記録します。審査済み定義は「作業者可用性は状態として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、作業者またはサブエージェントが作業を受けられるかを記録し、負荷、ライフサイクル状態、能力準備、代替状態を含みます」です。記録には審査済み項目 availability_assessment_id="WorkerAvailabilityAssessment:001", worker_role_id="WorkerRole:007", availability_status="available", load_ratio=0.35, assessed_at="2026-07-15T01:10:00Z", valid_until="2026-07-15T01:20:00Z", reason="capacity and concurrency are available" も設定されます。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 WorkerAvailability 以及方向保持不变的事实 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability。
expected_result.en: The run can query WorkerAvailability together with direction-preserving fact WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability.
expected_result.ja: この実行では WorkerAvailability と方向を保持した事実 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

labels.ja: 作業者可用性の境界例

descriptions.zh: WorkerAvailabilityAssessment 用作WorkerAvailability的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment 的已审查定义是“工作者可用性评估是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它检查候选角色在所需时间、预算和并发范围内是否可承担工作。”。不能因 relation WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability 而把它归入WorkerAvailability。
descriptions.en: WorkerAvailabilityAssessment is the boundary contrast for WorkerAvailability. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but WorkerAvailabilityAssessment's reviewed definition is “Worker availability assessment is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it checks whether candidate roles can accept work within required time, budget, and concurrency bounds.”. relation WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability does not make it a WorkerAvailability.
descriptions.ja: WorkerAvailabilityAssessment は WorkerAvailability の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、WorkerAvailabilityAssessment の審査済み定義は「ワーカー可用性評価は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは候補ロールが必要時間、予算、同時実行範囲で作業を引き受けられるか検査します。」です。relation WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability だけで WorkerAvailability にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: WorkerAvailabilityAssessment 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 WorkerAvailability。
expected_result.en: WorkerAvailabilityAssessment retains its own type; validation must not promote it to WorkerAvailability from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: WorkerAvailabilityAssessment は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで WorkerAvailability へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 WorkerAvailability（工作者可用性）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms WorkerAvailability (worker availability) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は WorkerAvailability（作業者可用性）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 WorkerAvailability 的 semantic kind 为 state，主父或骨架为 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability，并满足“semantic kind=state；backbone=WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms WorkerAvailability has semantic kind state, primary parent or backbone WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability, and invariants “semantic kind=state; backbone=WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は WorkerAvailability の semantic kind が state、主親または骨格が WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability であり、「semantic kind=state、backbone=WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: WorkerAvailability 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for WorkerAvailability were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: WorkerAvailability の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 工作者可用性已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: worker availability was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 作業者可用性は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

differentia.zh: 正向身份比较：父节点 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment：WorkerAvailability（semantic kind=state，骨架 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability）；WorkerCapabilityMatching（semantic kind=activity，骨架 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-precedes-WorkerCapabilityMatching）。双端条件：WorkerAvailability 条件：“作为状态，工作者可用性由这一事实区分：它记录工作者或子智能体是否能接收工作，包括负载、生命周期状态、能力就绪情况和备选状态”；WorkerCapabilityMatching 条件：“工作者能力匹配是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它把任务需求、权限与候选工作者能力证据进行比较”。仅依据各自定义与骨架逐端验证。
differentia.en: Positive identity comparison: parent WorkerAvailabilityAssessment: WorkerAvailability (semantic kind=state, backbone WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability); WorkerCapabilityMatching (semantic kind=activity, backbone WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-precedes-WorkerCapabilityMatching). Endpoint conditions: WorkerAvailability condition: “Worker availability belongs to the state category and differs from broader members in that it records whether a worker or subagent can accept work, including load, lifecycle state, capability readiness, and fallback status”; WorkerCapabilityMatching condition: “Worker capability matching is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it compares task requirements and authority with candidate-worker capability evidence”. Verify each endpoint from its own definition and backbone.
differentia.ja: 正の同一性比較：親 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment：WorkerAvailability（semantic kind=state、バックボーン WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-produces-WorkerAvailability）；WorkerCapabilityMatching（semantic kind=activity、バックボーン WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-precedes-WorkerCapabilityMatching）。両端条件：WorkerAvailability の条件：「作業者可用性は状態として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、作業者またはサブエージェントが作業を受けられるかを記録し、負荷、ライフサイクル状態、能力準備、代替状態を含みます」；WorkerCapabilityMatching の条件：「ワーカー能力照合は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それはタスク要件と権限を候補ワーカーの能力証拠と比較します」。各端を固有の定義とバックボーンで検証します。

short_definitions.zh: 工作者可用性评估是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它检查候选角色在所需时间、预算和并发范围内是否可承担工作。
short_definitions.en: Worker availability assessment is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it checks whether candidate roles can accept work within required time, budget, and concurrency bounds.
short_definitions.ja: ワーカー可用性評価は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは候補ロールが必要時間、予算、同時実行範囲で作業を引き受けられるか検査します。

definitions.zh: 工作者可用性评估是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它检查候选角色在所需时间、预算和并发范围内是否可承担工作。
definitions.en: Worker availability assessment is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it checks whether candidate roles can accept work within required time, budget, and concurrency bounds.
definitions.ja: ワーカー可用性評価は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは候補ロールが必要時間、予算、同時実行範囲で作業を引き受けられるか検査します。

why_needed.zh: 工作者可用性评估为canonical 事实 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess（WorkerAvailabilityAssessment phase_of WorkerSelectionProcess）提供明确端点并保持与 WorkerSelectionProcess 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: Worker availability assessment provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess (WorkerAvailabilityAssessment phase_of WorkerSelectionProcess) while preserving its reviewed boundary from WorkerSelectionProcess.
why_needed.ja: ワーカー可用性評価はcanonical 事実 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess（WorkerAvailabilityAssessment phase_of WorkerSelectionProcess）の明確な端点を提供し、WorkerSelectionProcess との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的工作者可用性评估：工作者可用性评估是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它检查候选角色在所需时间、预算和并发范围内是否可承担工作。；该种差可由关系 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes Worker availability assessment records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Worker availability assessment is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it checks whether candidate roles can accept work within required time, budget, and concurrency bounds. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たすワーカー可用性評価を含みます：ワーカー可用性評価は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは候補ロールが必要時間、予算、同時実行範囲で作業を引き受けられるか検査します。 種差は関係 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 工作者选择过程只是关系 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 的另一端；相关联不表示它是工作者可用性评估。
excludes.en: WorkerSelectionProcess is only the other endpoint of WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess; relatedness does not make it a WorkerAvailabilityAssessment.
excludes.ja: WorkerSelectionProcess は WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで WorkerAvailabilityAssessment にはなりません。

differentia.zh: 已审查兄弟区分：父节点 WorkerSelectionProcess：WorkerAvailabilityAssessment（semantic kind=activity，骨架 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess）；WorkerPool（semantic kind=collection，骨架 WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool）。双端条件：WorkerAvailabilityAssessment 条件：“工作者可用性评估是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它检查候选角色在所需时间、预算和并发范围内是否可承担工作”；WorkerPool 条件：“工作者候选池是一种集合；其区分条件是：工作者池是可供选择的工作者、子智能体、模型、工具或远程受托方集合，可按能力、负载、成本、权限和信任边界筛选”。任一条件成立不推出另一端。
differentia.en: Reviewed sibling distinction: parent WorkerSelectionProcess: WorkerAvailabilityAssessment (semantic kind=activity, backbone WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess); WorkerPool (semantic kind=collection, backbone WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool). Endpoint conditions: WorkerAvailabilityAssessment condition: “Worker availability assessment is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it checks whether candidate roles can accept work within required time, budget, and concurrency bounds”; WorkerPool condition: “As a collection, Worker pool is distinguished by the fact that it is a candidate set of workers, subagents, models, tools, or remote delegates available for selection by capability, load, cost, authority, and trust boundary”. Either condition leaves the other unproven.
differentia.ja: 審査済み兄弟区別：親 WorkerSelectionProcess：WorkerAvailabilityAssessment（semantic kind=activity、バックボーン WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess）；WorkerPool（semantic kind=collection、バックボーン WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool）。両端条件：WorkerAvailabilityAssessment の条件：「ワーカー可用性評価は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは候補ロールが必要時間、予算、同時実行範囲で作業を引き受けられるか検査します」；WorkerPool の条件：「集合に属するワーカー候補プールは、次の事実を種差とします：作業者プールは、能力、負荷、費用、権限、信頼境界に基づいて選べる作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具、遠隔受任者の集合です」。一方の成立は他方を証明しません。

labels.zh: 工作者可用性评估正例
labels.en: Positive example of Worker availability assessment
labels.ja: ワーカー可用性評価の正例

descriptions.zh: 在一次协调器的任务分解与委派运行中，系统将工作者可用性评估（WorkerAvailabilityAssessment）记录为 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment phase_of WorkerSelectionProcess 的源端点。其已审查定义是“工作者可用性评估是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它检查候选角色在所需时间、预算和并发范围内是否可承担工作”。
descriptions.en: During a coordinator run for task decomposition and delegation, the system records Worker availability assessment (WorkerAvailabilityAssessment) as the source of WorkerAvailabilityAssessment phase_of WorkerSelectionProcess. Its reviewed definition is “Worker availability assessment is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it checks whether candidate roles can accept work within required time, budget, and concurrency bounds”.
descriptions.ja: コーディネーターによるタスク分解と委任の実行では、システムはワーカー可用性評価（WorkerAvailabilityAssessment）を WorkerAvailabilityAssessment phase_of WorkerSelectionProcess の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「ワーカー可用性評価は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは候補ロールが必要時間、予算、同時実行範囲で作業を引き受けられるか検査します」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment 以及方向保持不变的事实 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess。
expected_result.en: The run can query WorkerAvailabilityAssessment together with direction-preserving fact WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess.
expected_result.ja: この実行では WorkerAvailabilityAssessment と方向を保持した事実 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

labels.zh: 工作者可用性评估边界例
labels.en: Boundary case for Worker availability assessment
labels.ja: ワーカー可用性評価の境界例

descriptions.zh: WorkerSelectionProcess 用作WorkerAvailabilityAssessment的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 WorkerSelectionProcess 的已审查定义是“工作者选择过程是以如下事实为区分特征的委派过程：它是在委派范围内评估可用性、匹配能力、作出选择并分配工作的协作过程。”。不能因 relation WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 而把它归入WorkerAvailabilityAssessment。
descriptions.en: WorkerSelectionProcess is the boundary contrast for WorkerAvailabilityAssessment. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but WorkerSelectionProcess's reviewed definition is “Worker selection process is a delegation process; its differentiating condition is that it is a collaboration process within delegation that assesses availability, matches capability, makes a selection, and assigns work.”. relation WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess does not make it a WorkerAvailabilityAssessment.
descriptions.ja: WorkerSelectionProcess は WorkerAvailabilityAssessment の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、WorkerSelectionProcess の審査済み定義は「ワーカー選択プロセスは委任プロセスの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは委任範囲内で可用性を評価し、能力を照合し、選択して作業を割り当てる協働プロセスです。」です。relation WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess だけで WorkerAvailabilityAssessment にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: WorkerSelectionProcess 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment。
expected_result.en: WorkerSelectionProcess retains its own type; validation must not promote it to WorkerAvailabilityAssessment from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: WorkerSelectionProcess は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで WorkerAvailabilityAssessment へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment（工作者可用性评估）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms WorkerAvailabilityAssessment (Worker availability assessment) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は WorkerAvailabilityAssessment（ワーカー可用性評価）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment 的 semantic kind 为 activity，主父或骨架为 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess，并满足“semantic kind=activity；backbone=WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms WorkerAvailabilityAssessment has semantic kind activity, primary parent or backbone WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess, and invariants “semantic kind=activity; backbone=WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は WorkerAvailabilityAssessment の semantic kind が activity、主親または骨格が WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess であり、「semantic kind=activity、backbone=WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: WorkerAvailabilityAssessment 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for WorkerAvailabilityAssessment were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: WorkerAvailabilityAssessment の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 工作者可用性评估已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: Worker availability assessment was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: ワーカー可用性評価は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 作为信息记录，工作者能力匹配证据由这一事实区分：它记录工作者、子智能体、模型或工具与任务所需能力、模态、权限或领域相匹配的证据。
short_definitions.en: Worker capability-match evidence belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it records the evidence that a worker, subagent, model, or tool matches the required task capability, modality, authority, or domain.
short_definitions.ja: 作業者能力一致証拠は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具が必要なタスク能力、モダリティ、権限、領域に合う証拠を記録します。

definitions.zh: 作为信息记录，工作者能力匹配证据由这一事实区分：它记录工作者、子智能体、模型或工具与任务所需能力、模态、权限或领域相匹配的证据。
definitions.en: Worker capability-match evidence belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it records the evidence that a worker, subagent, model, or tool matches the required task capability, modality, authority, or domain.
definitions.ja: 作業者能力一致証拠は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具が必要なタスク能力、モダリティ、権限、領域に合う証拠を記録します。

why_needed.zh: 工作者能力匹配证据为canonical 事实 WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection（WorkerCapabilityMatch justifies WorkerSelection）提供明确端点并保持与 WorkerSelection 的定义边界；节点字段 matching_activity_id、worker_role_id、requirement_ref 使该区别可验证。
why_needed.en: worker capability-match evidence provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection (WorkerCapabilityMatch justifies WorkerSelection) while preserving its reviewed boundary from WorkerSelection; node fields matching_activity_id, worker_role_id, requirement_ref make that distinction testable.
why_needed.ja: 作業者能力一致証拠はcanonical 事実 WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection（WorkerCapabilityMatch justifies WorkerSelection）の明確な端点を提供し、WorkerSelection との審査済み境界を保ちながら。ノード項目 matching_activity_id、worker_role_id、requirement_ref によりその区別を検証できます。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的工作者能力匹配证据：作为信息记录，工作者能力匹配证据由这一事实区分：它记录工作者、子智能体、模型或工具与任务所需能力、模态、权限或领域相匹配的证据。；该种差可由字段 matching_activity_id、worker_role_id、requirement_ref 检验。
includes.en: Includes worker capability-match evidence records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Worker capability-match evidence belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it records the evidence that a worker, subagent, model, or tool matches the required task capability, modality, authority, or domain. The differentia can be checked through fields matching_activity_id, worker_role_id, requirement_ref.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす作業者能力一致証拠を含みます：作業者能力一致証拠は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具が必要なタスク能力、モダリティ、権限、領域に合う証拠を記録します。 種差は項目 matching_activity_id、worker_role_id、requirement_ref で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 工作者选择只是关系 WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection 的另一端；相关联不表示它是工作者能力匹配证据。
excludes.en: WorkerSelection is only the other endpoint of WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection; relatedness does not make it a WorkerCapabilityMatch.
excludes.ja: WorkerSelection は WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで WorkerCapabilityMatch にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次协调器的任务分解与委派运行中，系统将工作者能力匹配证据（WorkerCapabilityMatch）记录为 WorkerCapabilityMatch justifies WorkerSelection 的源端点。其已审查定义是“作为信息记录，工作者能力匹配证据由这一事实区分：它记录工作者、子智能体、模型或工具与任务所需能力、模态、权限或领域相匹配的证据”。记录同时写入经审查字段 matching_activity_id="WorkerCapabilityMatching:001", worker_role_id="WorkerRole:007", requirement_ref="WorkItem:audit", score=0.92, matched=true, reason="capability and authority satisfy the work requirement", evidence_refs=["CapabilityDescriptor:code-review"], assessed_at="2026-07-15T01:12:00Z"。
descriptions.en: During a coordinator run for task decomposition and delegation, the system records worker capability-match evidence (WorkerCapabilityMatch) as the source of WorkerCapabilityMatch justifies WorkerSelection. Its reviewed definition is “Worker capability-match evidence belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it records the evidence that a worker, subagent, model, or tool matches the required task capability, modality, authority, or domain”. The record also binds reviewed fields matching_activity_id="WorkerCapabilityMatching:001", worker_role_id="WorkerRole:007", requirement_ref="WorkItem:audit", score=0.92, matched=true, reason="capability and authority satisfy the work requirement", evidence_refs=["CapabilityDescriptor:code-review"], assessed_at="2026-07-15T01:12:00Z".
descriptions.ja: コーディネーターによるタスク分解と委任の実行では、システムは作業者能力一致証拠（WorkerCapabilityMatch）を WorkerCapabilityMatch justifies WorkerSelection の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「作業者能力一致証拠は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具が必要なタスク能力、モダリティ、権限、領域に合う証拠を記録します」です。記録には審査済み項目 matching_activity_id="WorkerCapabilityMatching:001", worker_role_id="WorkerRole:007", requirement_ref="WorkItem:audit", score=0.92, matched=true, reason="capability and authority satisfy the work requirement", evidence_refs=["CapabilityDescriptor:code-review"], assessed_at="2026-07-15T01:12:00Z" も設定されます。

field_values.reason: capability and authority satisfy the work requirement

labels.en: Boundary case for worker capability-match evidence
labels.ja: 作業者能力一致証拠の境界例

descriptions.zh: WorkerSelection 用作WorkerCapabilityMatch的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 WorkerSelection 的已审查定义是“工作者选择是一种事件；其区分条件是：它是决策事件，根据能力、可用性、成本、安全和上下文匹配证据，从候选池中选择工作者、子智能体、模型、工具或路由。”。不能因 relation WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection 而把它归入WorkerCapabilityMatch。
descriptions.en: WorkerSelection is the boundary contrast for WorkerCapabilityMatch. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but WorkerSelection's reviewed definition is “As an event, Worker selection is distinguished by the fact that it is a decision event that chooses a worker, subagent, model, tool, or route from a candidate pool using capability, availability, cost, safety, and context-fit evidence.”. relation WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection does not make it a WorkerCapabilityMatch.
descriptions.ja: WorkerSelection は WorkerCapabilityMatch の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、WorkerSelection の審査済み定義は「事象に属する作業者選択は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、能力、可用性、費用、安全性、文脈適合の証拠に基づき、候補集合から作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具、経路を選ぶ決定イベントです。」です。relation WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection だけで WorkerCapabilityMatch にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: WorkerSelection 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 WorkerCapabilityMatch。
expected_result.en: WorkerSelection retains its own type; validation must not promote it to WorkerCapabilityMatch from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: WorkerSelection は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで WorkerCapabilityMatch へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 WorkerCapabilityMatch（工作者能力匹配证据）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms WorkerCapabilityMatch (worker capability-match evidence) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は WorkerCapabilityMatch（作業者能力一致証拠）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 WorkerCapabilityMatch 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 WorkerCapabilityMatching-produces-WorkerCapabilityMatch，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=WorkerCapabilityMatching-produces-WorkerCapabilityMatch；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms WorkerCapabilityMatch has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone WorkerCapabilityMatching-produces-WorkerCapabilityMatch, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=WorkerCapabilityMatching-produces-WorkerCapabilityMatch; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は WorkerCapabilityMatch の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が WorkerCapabilityMatching-produces-WorkerCapabilityMatch であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=WorkerCapabilityMatching-produces-WorkerCapabilityMatch、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: WorkerCapabilityMatch 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for WorkerCapabilityMatch were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: WorkerCapabilityMatch の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 工作者能力匹配证据以信息记录身份保留需求、候选能力、权限与匹配依据；其标签与执行匹配活动明确区分。
change_note.en: Worker capability-match evidence retains requirements, candidate capability, authority, and matching rationale as an information record; its label is distinct from the matching activity.
change_note.ja: 作業者能力一致証拠は要件、候補能力、権限、照合根拠を情報記録として保持し、照合活動とはラベルを明確に区別します。

differentia.zh: 共享父节点对照：父节点 WorkerCapabilityMatching：WorkerCapabilityMatch（semantic kind=information，骨架 WorkerCapabilityMatching-produces-WorkerCapabilityMatch）；WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity（semantic kind=activity，骨架 WorkerCapabilityMatching-precedes-WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity）。双端条件：WorkerCapabilityMatch 条件：“作为信息记录，工作者能力匹配证据由这一事实区分：它记录工作者、子智能体、模型或工具与任务所需能力、模态、权限或领域相匹配的证据”；WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity 条件：“工作者选择决定活动是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它在可用候选中依据匹配证据和委派合同确定受派方”。逐端验证；父节点不证明任一身份。
differentia.en: Shared-parent contrast: parent WorkerCapabilityMatching: WorkerCapabilityMatch (semantic kind=information, backbone WorkerCapabilityMatching-produces-WorkerCapabilityMatch); WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity (semantic kind=activity, backbone WorkerCapabilityMatching-precedes-WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity). Endpoint conditions: WorkerCapabilityMatch condition: “Worker capability-match evidence belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it records the evidence that a worker, subagent, model, or tool matches the required task capability, modality, authority, or domain”; WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity condition: “Worker selection decision activity is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it chooses a delegate among available candidates using match evidence and the delegation contract”. Verify each endpoint; the parent proves neither identity.
differentia.ja: 共有親対照：親 WorkerCapabilityMatching：WorkerCapabilityMatch（semantic kind=information、バックボーン WorkerCapabilityMatching-produces-WorkerCapabilityMatch）；WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity（semantic kind=activity、バックボーン WorkerCapabilityMatching-precedes-WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity）。両端条件：WorkerCapabilityMatch の条件：「作業者能力一致証拠は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具が必要なタスク能力、モダリティ、権限、領域に合う証拠を記録します」；WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity の条件：「ワーカー選択判断活動は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは照合証拠と委任契約に基づき可用候補から受任者を選びます」。各端を検証し、親だけでは同一性を証明しません。

short_definitions.zh: 工作者能力匹配是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它把任务需求、权限与候选工作者能力证据进行比较。
short_definitions.en: Worker capability matching is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it compares task requirements and authority with candidate-worker capability evidence.
short_definitions.ja: ワーカー能力照合は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それはタスク要件と権限を候補ワーカーの能力証拠と比較します。

definitions.zh: 工作者能力匹配是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它把任务需求、权限与候选工作者能力证据进行比较。
definitions.en: Worker capability matching is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it compares task requirements and authority with candidate-worker capability evidence.
definitions.ja: ワーカー能力照合は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それはタスク要件と権限を候補ワーカーの能力証拠と比較します。

why_needed.zh: 工作者能力匹配为canonical 事实 WorkerCapabilityMatching-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess（WorkerCapabilityMatching phase_of WorkerSelectionProcess）提供明确端点并保持与 WorkerSelectionProcess 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: Worker capability matching provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact WorkerCapabilityMatching-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess (WorkerCapabilityMatching phase_of WorkerSelectionProcess) while preserving its reviewed boundary from WorkerSelectionProcess.
why_needed.ja: ワーカー能力照合はcanonical 事実 WorkerCapabilityMatching-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess（WorkerCapabilityMatching phase_of WorkerSelectionProcess）の明確な端点を提供し、WorkerSelectionProcess との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的工作者能力匹配：工作者能力匹配是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它把任务需求、权限与候选工作者能力证据进行比较。；该种差可由关系 WorkerCapabilityMatching-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes Worker capability matching records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Worker capability matching is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it compares task requirements and authority with candidate-worker capability evidence. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in WorkerCapabilityMatching-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たすワーカー能力照合を含みます：ワーカー能力照合は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それはタスク要件と権限を候補ワーカーの能力証拠と比較します。 種差は関係 WorkerCapabilityMatching-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 工作者选择过程只是关系 WorkerCapabilityMatching-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 的另一端；相关联不表示它是工作者能力匹配。
excludes.en: WorkerSelectionProcess is only the other endpoint of WorkerCapabilityMatching-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess; relatedness does not make it a WorkerCapabilityMatching.
excludes.ja: WorkerSelectionProcess は WorkerCapabilityMatching-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで WorkerCapabilityMatching にはなりません。

labels.zh: 工作者能力匹配边界例
labels.en: Boundary case for Worker capability matching
labels.ja: ワーカー能力照合の境界例

descriptions.zh: WorkerSelectionProcess 用作WorkerCapabilityMatching的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 WorkerSelectionProcess 的已审查定义是“工作者选择过程是以如下事实为区分特征的委派过程：它是在委派范围内评估可用性、匹配能力、作出选择并分配工作的协作过程。”。不能因 relation WorkerCapabilityMatching-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 而把它归入WorkerCapabilityMatching。
descriptions.en: WorkerSelectionProcess is the boundary contrast for WorkerCapabilityMatching. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but WorkerSelectionProcess's reviewed definition is “Worker selection process is a delegation process; its differentiating condition is that it is a collaboration process within delegation that assesses availability, matches capability, makes a selection, and assigns work.”. relation WorkerCapabilityMatching-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess does not make it a WorkerCapabilityMatching.
descriptions.ja: WorkerSelectionProcess は WorkerCapabilityMatching の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、WorkerSelectionProcess の審査済み定義は「ワーカー選択プロセスは委任プロセスの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは委任範囲内で可用性を評価し、能力を照合し、選択して作業を割り当てる協働プロセスです。」です。relation WorkerCapabilityMatching-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess だけで WorkerCapabilityMatching にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: WorkerSelectionProcess 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 WorkerCapabilityMatching。
expected_result.en: WorkerSelectionProcess retains its own type; validation must not promote it to WorkerCapabilityMatching from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: WorkerSelectionProcess は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで WorkerCapabilityMatching へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 WorkerCapabilityMatching-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of WorkerCapabilityMatching-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、WorkerCapabilityMatching-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 WorkerCapabilityMatching（工作者能力匹配）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms WorkerCapabilityMatching (Worker capability matching) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は WorkerCapabilityMatching（ワーカー能力照合）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 WorkerCapabilityMatching 的 semantic kind 为 activity，主父或骨架为 WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-precedes-WorkerCapabilityMatching，并满足“semantic kind=activity；backbone=WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-precedes-WorkerCapabilityMatching；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms WorkerCapabilityMatching has semantic kind activity, primary parent or backbone WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-precedes-WorkerCapabilityMatching, and invariants “semantic kind=activity; backbone=WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-precedes-WorkerCapabilityMatching; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は WorkerCapabilityMatching の semantic kind が activity、主親または骨格が WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-precedes-WorkerCapabilityMatching であり、「semantic kind=activity、backbone=WorkerAvailabilityAssessment-precedes-WorkerCapabilityMatching、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: WorkerCapabilityMatching 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for WorkerCapabilityMatching were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: WorkerCapabilityMatching の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 工作者能力匹配已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: Worker capability matching was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: ワーカー能力照合は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 工作者候选池是一种集合；其区分条件是：工作者池是可供选择的工作者、子智能体、模型、工具或远程受托方集合，可按能力、负载、成本、权限和信任边界筛选。
short_definitions.en: As a collection, Worker pool is distinguished by the fact that it is a candidate set of workers, subagents, models, tools, or remote delegates available for selection by capability, load, cost, authority, and trust boundary.
short_definitions.ja: 集合に属するワーカー候補プールは、次の事実を種差とします：作業者プールは、能力、負荷、費用、権限、信頼境界に基づいて選べる作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具、遠隔受任者の集合です。

definitions.zh: 工作者候选池是一种集合；其区分条件是：工作者池是可供选择的工作者、子智能体、模型、工具或远程受托方集合，可按能力、负载、成本、权限和信任边界筛选。
definitions.en: As a collection, Worker pool is distinguished by the fact that it is a candidate set of workers, subagents, models, tools, or remote delegates available for selection by capability, load, cost, authority, and trust boundary.
definitions.ja: 集合に属するワーカー候補プールは、次の事実を種差とします：作業者プールは、能力、負荷、費用、権限、信頼境界に基づいて選べる作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具、遠隔受任者の集合です。

why_needed.zh: 工作者候选池为canonical 事实 WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole（WorkerPool contains WorkerRole）提供明确端点并保持与 WorkerRole 的定义边界；节点字段 worker_pool_id、version、delegation_id 使该区别可验证。
why_needed.en: worker pool provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole (WorkerPool contains WorkerRole) while preserving its reviewed boundary from WorkerRole; node fields worker_pool_id, version, delegation_id make that distinction testable.
why_needed.ja: ワーカー候補プールはcanonical 事実 WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole（WorkerPool contains WorkerRole）の明確な端点を提供し、WorkerRole との審査済み境界を保ちながら。ノード項目 worker_pool_id、version、delegation_id によりその区別を検証できます。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的工作者候选池：工作者候选池是一种集合；其区分条件是：工作者池是可供选择的工作者、子智能体、模型、工具或远程受托方集合，可按能力、负载、成本、权限和信任边界筛选。；该种差可由字段 worker_pool_id、version、delegation_id 检验。
includes.en: Includes worker pool records satisfying this reviewed differentia: As a collection, Worker pool is distinguished by the fact that it is a candidate set of workers, subagents, models, tools, or remote delegates available for selection by capability, load, cost, authority, and trust boundary. The differentia can be checked through fields worker_pool_id, version, delegation_id.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たすワーカー候補プールを含みます：集合に属するワーカー候補プールは、次の事実を種差とします：作業者プールは、能力、負荷、費用、権限、信頼境界に基づいて選べる作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具、遠隔受任者の集合です。 種差は項目 worker_pool_id、version、delegation_id で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 工作者角色只是关系 WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole 的另一端；相关联不表示它是工作者候选池。
excludes.en: WorkerRole is only the other endpoint of WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole; relatedness does not make it a WorkerPool.
excludes.ja: WorkerRole は WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで WorkerPool にはなりません。

labels.ja: ワーカー候補プールの正例

descriptions.zh: 在一次协调器的任务分解与委派运行中，系统将工作者候选池（WorkerPool）记录为 WorkerPool contains WorkerRole 的源端点。其已审查定义是“工作者候选池是一种集合；其区分条件是：工作者池是可供选择的工作者、子智能体、模型、工具或远程受托方集合，可按能力、负载、成本、权限和信任边界筛选”。记录同时写入经审查字段 worker_pool_id="worker-pool-001", version="1", delegation_id="DelegationContract:delegation-001", selection_scope="repository audit", created_at="2026-07-15T01:05:00Z"。
descriptions.en: During a coordinator run for task decomposition and delegation, the system records worker pool (WorkerPool) as the source of WorkerPool contains WorkerRole. Its reviewed definition is “As a collection, Worker pool is distinguished by the fact that it is a candidate set of workers, subagents, models, tools, or remote delegates available for selection by capability, load, cost, authority, and trust boundary”. The record also binds reviewed fields worker_pool_id="worker-pool-001", version="1", delegation_id="DelegationContract:delegation-001", selection_scope="repository audit", created_at="2026-07-15T01:05:00Z".
descriptions.ja: コーディネーターによるタスク分解と委任の実行では、システムはワーカー候補プール（WorkerPool）を WorkerPool contains WorkerRole の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「集合に属するワーカー候補プールは、次の事実を種差とします：作業者プールは、能力、負荷、費用、権限、信頼境界に基づいて選べる作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具、遠隔受任者の集合です」です。記録には審査済み項目 worker_pool_id="worker-pool-001", version="1", delegation_id="DelegationContract:delegation-001", selection_scope="repository audit", created_at="2026-07-15T01:05:00Z" も設定されます。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 WorkerPool 以及方向保持不变的事实 WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole。
expected_result.en: The run can query WorkerPool together with direction-preserving fact WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole.
expected_result.ja: この実行では WorkerPool と方向を保持した事実 WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

labels.ja: ワーカー候補プールの境界例

descriptions.zh: WorkerRole 用作WorkerPool的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 WorkerRole 的已审查定义是“工作者角色是接收有范围工作、执行约定任务并返回证据的协调角色，可由 Agent、模型服务或工具服务承担。”。不能因 relation WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole 而把它归入WorkerPool。
descriptions.en: WorkerRole is the boundary contrast for WorkerPool. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but WorkerRole's reviewed definition is “Worker role is a coordination role that accepts scoped work, performs agreed tasks, and returns evidence; it may be borne by an agent, model service, or tool service.”. relation WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole does not make it a WorkerPool.
descriptions.ja: WorkerRole は WorkerPool の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、WorkerRole の審査済み定義は「調整役割に属するワーカーロールは、次の事実を種差とします：それは範囲付き作業を受け、合意したタスクを実行し、証拠を返す協調ロールで、Agent、モデルサービス、ツールサービスが担えます。」です。relation WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole だけで WorkerPool にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: WorkerRole 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 WorkerPool。
expected_result.en: WorkerRole retains its own type; validation must not promote it to WorkerPool from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: WorkerRole は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで WorkerPool へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、WorkerPool-contains-WorkerRole の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 WorkerPool（工作者候选池）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms WorkerPool (worker pool) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は WorkerPool（ワーカー候補プール）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 WorkerPool 的 semantic kind 为 collection，主父或骨架为 WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool，并满足“semantic kind=collection；backbone=WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms WorkerPool has semantic kind collection, primary parent or backbone WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool, and invariants “semantic kind=collection; backbone=WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は WorkerPool の semantic kind が collection、主親または骨格が WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool であり、「semantic kind=collection、backbone=WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: WorkerPool 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for WorkerPool were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: WorkerPool の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 工作者候选池已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: worker pool was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: ワーカー候補プールは明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 工作者选择是一种事件；其区分条件是：它是决策事件，根据能力、可用性、成本、安全和上下文匹配证据，从候选池中选择工作者、子智能体、模型、工具或路由。
short_definitions.en: As an event, Worker selection is distinguished by the fact that it is a decision event that chooses a worker, subagent, model, tool, or route from a candidate pool using capability, availability, cost, safety, and context-fit evidence.
short_definitions.ja: 事象に属する作業者選択は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、能力、可用性、費用、安全性、文脈適合の証拠に基づき、候補集合から作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具、経路を選ぶ決定イベントです。

definitions.zh: 工作者选择是一种事件；其区分条件是：它是决策事件，根据能力、可用性、成本、安全和上下文匹配证据，从候选池中选择工作者、子智能体、模型、工具或路由。
definitions.en: As an event, Worker selection is distinguished by the fact that it is a decision event that chooses a worker, subagent, model, tool, or route from a candidate pool using capability, availability, cost, safety, and context-fit evidence.
definitions.ja: 事象に属する作業者選択は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、能力、可用性、費用、安全性、文脈適合の証拠に基づき、候補集合から作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具、経路を選ぶ決定イベントです。

why_needed.zh: 工作者选择为canonical 事实 WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection（WorkerCapabilityMatch justifies WorkerSelection）提供明确端点并保持与 WorkerCapabilityMatch 的定义边界；节点字段 selection_id、decision_activity_id、worker_pool_id 使该区别可验证。
why_needed.en: worker selection provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection (WorkerCapabilityMatch justifies WorkerSelection) while preserving its reviewed boundary from WorkerCapabilityMatch; node fields selection_id, decision_activity_id, worker_pool_id make that distinction testable.
why_needed.ja: 作業者選択はcanonical 事実 WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection（WorkerCapabilityMatch justifies WorkerSelection）の明確な端点を提供し、WorkerCapabilityMatch との審査済み境界を保ちながら。ノード項目 selection_id、decision_activity_id、worker_pool_id によりその区別を検証できます。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的工作者选择：工作者选择是一种事件；其区分条件是：它是决策事件，根据能力、可用性、成本、安全和上下文匹配证据，从候选池中选择工作者、子智能体、模型、工具或路由。；该种差可由字段 selection_id、decision_activity_id、worker_pool_id 检验。
includes.en: Includes worker selection records satisfying this reviewed differentia: As an event, Worker selection is distinguished by the fact that it is a decision event that chooses a worker, subagent, model, tool, or route from a candidate pool using capability, availability, cost, safety, and context-fit evidence. The differentia can be checked through fields selection_id, decision_activity_id, worker_pool_id.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす作業者選択を含みます：事象に属する作業者選択は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、能力、可用性、費用、安全性、文脈適合の証拠に基づき、候補集合から作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具、経路を選ぶ決定イベントです。 種差は項目 selection_id、decision_activity_id、worker_pool_id で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 工作者能力匹配证据只是关系 WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection 的另一端；相关联不表示它是工作者选择。
excludes.en: WorkerCapabilityMatch is only the other endpoint of WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection; relatedness does not make it a WorkerSelection.
excludes.ja: WorkerCapabilityMatch は WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで WorkerSelection にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次协调器的任务分解与委派运行中，系统将工作者选择（WorkerSelection）记录为 WorkerCapabilityMatch justifies WorkerSelection 的目标端点。其已审查定义是“工作者选择是一种事件；其区分条件是：它是决策事件，根据能力、可用性、成本、安全和上下文匹配证据，从候选池中选择工作者、子智能体、模型、工具或路由”。记录同时写入经审查字段 selection_id="worker-selection-001", decision_activity_id="WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity:001", worker_pool_id="WorkerPool:001", selected_worker_role_id="WorkerRole:007", decided_at="2026-07-15T01:15:00Z", reason="best available capability match within delegation bounds", rejected_candidate_reasons=["WorkerRole:008 unavailable"]。
descriptions.en: During a coordinator run for task decomposition and delegation, the system records worker selection (WorkerSelection) as the target of WorkerCapabilityMatch justifies WorkerSelection. Its reviewed definition is “As an event, Worker selection is distinguished by the fact that it is a decision event that chooses a worker, subagent, model, tool, or route from a candidate pool using capability, availability, cost, safety, and context-fit evidence”. The record also binds reviewed fields selection_id="worker-selection-001", decision_activity_id="WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity:001", worker_pool_id="WorkerPool:001", selected_worker_role_id="WorkerRole:007", decided_at="2026-07-15T01:15:00Z", reason="best available capability match within delegation bounds", rejected_candidate_reasons=["WorkerRole:008 unavailable"].
descriptions.ja: コーディネーターによるタスク分解と委任の実行では、システムは作業者選択（WorkerSelection）を WorkerCapabilityMatch justifies WorkerSelection の終点として記録します。審査済み定義は「事象に属する作業者選択は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、能力、可用性、費用、安全性、文脈適合の証拠に基づき、候補集合から作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具、経路を選ぶ決定イベントです」です。記録には審査済み項目 selection_id="worker-selection-001", decision_activity_id="WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity:001", worker_pool_id="WorkerPool:001", selected_worker_role_id="WorkerRole:007", decided_at="2026-07-15T01:15:00Z", reason="best available capability match within delegation bounds", rejected_candidate_reasons=["WorkerRole:008 unavailable"] も設定されます。

field_values.reason: best available capability match within delegation bounds

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 WorkerSelection 以及方向保持不变的事实 WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection。
expected_result.en: The run can query WorkerSelection together with direction-preserving fact WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection.
expected_result.ja: この実行では WorkerSelection と方向を保持した事実 WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: WorkerCapabilityMatch 用作WorkerSelection的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 WorkerCapabilityMatch 的已审查定义是“作为信息记录，工作者能力匹配证据由这一事实区分：它记录工作者、子智能体、模型或工具与任务所需能力、模态、权限或领域相匹配的证据。”。不能因 relation WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection 而把它归入WorkerSelection。
descriptions.en: WorkerCapabilityMatch is the boundary contrast for WorkerSelection. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but WorkerCapabilityMatch's reviewed definition is “Worker capability-match evidence belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it records the evidence that a worker, subagent, model, or tool matches the required task capability, modality, authority, or domain.”. relation WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection does not make it a WorkerSelection.
descriptions.ja: WorkerCapabilityMatch は WorkerSelection の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、WorkerCapabilityMatch の審査済み定義は「作業者能力一致証拠は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具が必要なタスク能力、モダリティ、権限、領域に合う証拠を記録します。」です。relation WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection だけで WorkerSelection にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: WorkerCapabilityMatch 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 WorkerSelection。
expected_result.en: WorkerCapabilityMatch retains its own type; validation must not promote it to WorkerSelection from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: WorkerCapabilityMatch は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで WorkerSelection へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、WorkerCapabilityMatch-justifies-WorkerSelection の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 WorkerSelection（工作者选择）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms WorkerSelection (worker selection) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は WorkerSelection（作業者選択）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 WorkerSelection 的 semantic kind 为 event，主父或骨架为 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-produces-WorkerSelection，并满足“semantic kind=event；backbone=WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-produces-WorkerSelection；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms WorkerSelection has semantic kind event, primary parent or backbone WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-produces-WorkerSelection, and invariants “semantic kind=event; backbone=WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-produces-WorkerSelection; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は WorkerSelection の semantic kind が event、主親または骨格が WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-produces-WorkerSelection であり、「semantic kind=event、backbone=WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-produces-WorkerSelection、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: WorkerSelection 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for WorkerSelection were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: WorkerSelection の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 工作者选择已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: worker selection was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 作業者選択は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

labels.ja: ワーカー選択判断活動

short_definitions.zh: 工作者选择决定活动是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它在可用候选中依据匹配证据和委派合同确定受派方。
short_definitions.en: Worker selection decision activity is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it chooses a delegate among available candidates using match evidence and the delegation contract.
short_definitions.ja: ワーカー選択判断活動は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは照合証拠と委任契約に基づき可用候補から受任者を選びます。

definitions.zh: 工作者选择决定活动是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它在可用候选中依据匹配证据和委派合同确定受派方。
definitions.en: Worker selection decision activity is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it chooses a delegate among available candidates using match evidence and the delegation contract.
definitions.ja: ワーカー選択判断活動は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは照合証拠と委任契約に基づき可用候補から受任者を選びます。

why_needed.zh: 工作者选择决定活动为canonical 事实 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess（WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity phase_of WorkerSelectionProcess）提供明确端点并保持与 WorkerSelectionProcess 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: Worker selection decision activity provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess (WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity phase_of WorkerSelectionProcess) while preserving its reviewed boundary from WorkerSelectionProcess.
why_needed.ja: ワーカー選択判断活動はcanonical 事実 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess（WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity phase_of WorkerSelectionProcess）の明確な端点を提供し、WorkerSelectionProcess との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的工作者选择决定活动：工作者选择决定活动是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它在可用候选中依据匹配证据和委派合同确定受派方。；该种差可由关系 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes Worker selection decision activity records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Worker selection decision activity is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it chooses a delegate among available candidates using match evidence and the delegation contract. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たすワーカー選択判断活動を含みます：ワーカー選択判断活動は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは照合証拠と委任契約に基づき可用候補から受任者を選びます。 種差は関係 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 工作者选择过程只是关系 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 的另一端；相关联不表示它是工作者选择决定活动。
excludes.en: WorkerSelectionProcess is only the other endpoint of WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess; relatedness does not make it a WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity.
excludes.ja: WorkerSelectionProcess は WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次协调器的任务分解与委派运行中，系统将工作者选择决定活动（WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity）记录为 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity phase_of WorkerSelectionProcess 的源端点。其已审查定义是“工作者选择决定活动是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它在可用候选中依据匹配证据和委派合同确定受派方”。
descriptions.en: During a coordinator run for task decomposition and delegation, the system records Worker selection decision activity (WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity) as the source of WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity phase_of WorkerSelectionProcess. Its reviewed definition is “Worker selection decision activity is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it chooses a delegate among available candidates using match evidence and the delegation contract”.
descriptions.ja: コーディネーターによるタスク分解と委任の実行では、システムはワーカー選択判断活動（WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity）を WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity phase_of WorkerSelectionProcess の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「ワーカー選択判断活動は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは照合証拠と委任契約に基づき可用候補から受任者を選びます」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity 以及方向保持不变的事实 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess。
expected_result.en: The run can query WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity together with direction-preserving fact WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess.
expected_result.ja: この実行では WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity と方向を保持した事実 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

labels.en: Boundary case for Worker selection decision activity
labels.ja: ワーカー選択判断活動の境界例

descriptions.zh: WorkerSelectionProcess 用作WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 WorkerSelectionProcess 的已审查定义是“工作者选择过程是以如下事实为区分特征的委派过程：它是在委派范围内评估可用性、匹配能力、作出选择并分配工作的协作过程。”。不能因 relation WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 而把它归入WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity。
descriptions.en: WorkerSelectionProcess is the boundary contrast for WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but WorkerSelectionProcess's reviewed definition is “Worker selection process is a delegation process; its differentiating condition is that it is a collaboration process within delegation that assesses availability, matches capability, makes a selection, and assigns work.”. relation WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess does not make it a WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity.
descriptions.ja: WorkerSelectionProcess は WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、WorkerSelectionProcess の審査済み定義は「ワーカー選択プロセスは委任プロセスの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは委任範囲内で可用性を評価し、能力を照合し、選択して作業を割り当てる協働プロセスです。」です。relation WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess だけで WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: WorkerSelectionProcess 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity。
expected_result.en: WorkerSelectionProcess retains its own type; validation must not promote it to WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: WorkerSelectionProcess は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity（工作者选择决定活动）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity (Worker selection decision activity) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity（ワーカー選択判断活動）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity 的 semantic kind 为 activity，主父或骨架为 WorkerCapabilityMatching-precedes-WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity，并满足“semantic kind=activity；backbone=WorkerCapabilityMatching-precedes-WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity has semantic kind activity, primary parent or backbone WorkerCapabilityMatching-precedes-WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity, and invariants “semantic kind=activity; backbone=WorkerCapabilityMatching-precedes-WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity の semantic kind が activity、主親または骨格が WorkerCapabilityMatching-precedes-WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity であり、「semantic kind=activity、backbone=WorkerCapabilityMatching-precedes-WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 工作者选择决定活动已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: Worker selection decision activity was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: ワーカー選択判断活動は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

labels.ja: ワーカー選択プロセス

short_definitions.zh: 工作者选择过程是以如下事实为区分特征的委派过程：它是在委派范围内评估可用性、匹配能力、作出选择并分配工作的协作过程。
short_definitions.en: Worker selection process is a delegation process; its differentiating condition is that it is a collaboration process within delegation that assesses availability, matches capability, makes a selection, and assigns work.
short_definitions.ja: ワーカー選択プロセスは委任プロセスの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは委任範囲内で可用性を評価し、能力を照合し、選択して作業を割り当てる協働プロセスです。

definitions.zh: 工作者选择过程是以如下事实为区分特征的委派过程：它是在委派范围内评估可用性、匹配能力、作出选择并分配工作的协作过程。
definitions.en: Worker selection process is a delegation process; its differentiating condition is that it is a collaboration process within delegation that assesses availability, matches capability, makes a selection, and assigns work.
definitions.ja: ワーカー選択プロセスは委任プロセスの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは委任範囲内で可用性を評価し、能力を照合し、選択して作業を割り当てる協働プロセスです。

why_needed.zh: 工作者选择过程为canonical 事实 WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool（WorkerSelectionProcess uses WorkerPool）提供明确端点并保持与 DelegationProcess 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: Worker selection process provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool (WorkerSelectionProcess uses WorkerPool) while preserving its reviewed boundary from DelegationProcess.
why_needed.ja: ワーカー選択プロセスはcanonical 事実 WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool（WorkerSelectionProcess uses WorkerPool）の明確な端点を提供し、DelegationProcess との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的工作者选择过程：工作者选择过程是以如下事实为区分特征的委派过程：它是在委派范围内评估可用性、匹配能力、作出选择并分配工作的协作过程。；该种差可由关系 WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes Worker selection process records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Worker selection process is a delegation process; its differentiating condition is that it is a collaboration process within delegation that assesses availability, matches capability, makes a selection, and assigns work. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たすワーカー選択プロセスを含みます：ワーカー選択プロセスは委任プロセスの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは委任範囲内で可用性を評価し、能力を照合し、選択して作業を割り当てる協働プロセスです。 種差は関係 WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 仅能识别为上位概念 DelegationProcess 的对象不在范围内；它尚未证明工作者选择过程的种差或关系端点 WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool。
excludes.en: An object identified only as broader concept DelegationProcess is excluded until it proves WorkerSelectionProcess's differentia or its endpoint role in WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool.
excludes.ja: 上位概念 DelegationProcess としか識別できない対象は、WorkerSelectionProcess の種差または WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool の端点役割を証明するまで範囲外です。

descriptions.zh: DelegationProcess 用作WorkerSelectionProcess的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 DelegationProcess 的已审查定义是“委派过程是以如下事实为区分特征的协作过程：它是委派者依据合同把有范围的工作、权限、上下文与预算交给代理角色执行，并接收可追踪结果而保持或转移明确归属的协调活动。”。不能因 relation WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool 而把它归入WorkerSelectionProcess。
descriptions.en: DelegationProcess is the boundary contrast for WorkerSelectionProcess. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but DelegationProcess's reviewed definition is “Delegation process is a Collaboration process; its differentiating condition is that it is a coordination activity in which a delegator assigns scoped work, authority, context, and budget under a contract to a delegate role and receives a traceable result with explicit retained or transferred ownership.”. relation WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool does not make it a WorkerSelectionProcess.
descriptions.ja: DelegationProcess は WorkerSelectionProcess の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、DelegationProcess の審査済み定義は「委任プロセスは協働プロセスの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：DelegationProcess は委任者が契約に基づき範囲付き作業、権限、文脈、予算を代理役割へ割り当て、明示された保持・移転帰属と共に追跡可能な結果を受け取る調整活動である。」です。relation WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool だけで WorkerSelectionProcess にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: DelegationProcess 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 WorkerSelectionProcess。
expected_result.en: DelegationProcess retains its own type; validation must not promote it to WorkerSelectionProcess from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: DelegationProcess は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで WorkerSelectionProcess へ昇格してはなりません。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 AcceptancePhase-is_a-DelegationPhase（is a）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms AcceptancePhase-is_a-DelegationPhase (is a) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は AcceptancePhase-is_a-DelegationPhase（is a）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 AcceptancePhase-is_a-DelegationPhase 的 predicate 为 is_a，方向为 AcceptancePhase → DelegationPhase，relation kind 为 hierarchy，layout role 为 primary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 AcceptancePhase→DelegationPhase、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation AcceptancePhase-is_a-DelegationPhase has predicate is_a, direction AcceptancePhase → DelegationPhase, relation kind hierarchy, layout role primary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction AcceptancePhase->DelegationPhase, predicate=is_a, relation kind=hierarchy, layout role=primary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 AcceptancePhase-is_a-DelegationPhase の predicate が is_a、方向が AcceptancePhase → DelegationPhase、relation kind が hierarchy、layout role が primary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 AcceptancePhase→DelegationPhase、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: AcceptancePhase-is_a-DelegationPhase 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 DelegationBudget-constrains-DelegationProcess（constrains）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms DelegationBudget-constrains-DelegationProcess (constrains) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は DelegationBudget-constrains-DelegationProcess（constrains）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 DelegationBudget-constrains-DelegationProcess 的 predicate 为 constrains，方向为 DelegationBudget → DelegationProcess，relation kind 为 governance，layout role 为 cross-link，并满足“canonical 方向 DelegationBudget→DelegationProcess、predicate=constrains、relation kind=governance、layout role=cross-link”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation DelegationBudget-constrains-DelegationProcess has predicate constrains, direction DelegationBudget → DelegationProcess, relation kind governance, layout role cross-link, and invariants “canonical direction DelegationBudget->DelegationProcess, predicate=constrains, relation kind=governance, layout role=cross-link”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 DelegationBudget-constrains-DelegationProcess の predicate が constrains、方向が DelegationBudget → DelegationProcess、relation kind が governance、layout role が cross-link であり、「canonical 方向 DelegationBudget→DelegationProcess、predicate=constrains、relation kind=governance、layout role=cross-link」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: DelegationBudget-constrains-DelegationProcess 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for DelegationBudget-constrains-DelegationProcess were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: DelegationBudget-constrains-DelegationProcess の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

descriptions.ja: DelegationContract と DelegatedAuthority は同時に現れますが、検証可能な「delegates authority scope」アサーションがなく、共起だけではこの関係を成立させません。 審査済み定義：権限委任関係は、委任契約を、使用できる道具、記憶、データ領域、操作を定める権限範囲へ結びます。

expected_result.zh: 验证器不得把该对象归类为delegates authority scope。
expected_result.en: Validation must not classify the object as delegates authority scope.
expected_result.ja: 検証器はこの対象をdelegates authority scopeとして分類してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 関連性または共通の上位概念だけでは、厳密な概念所属を証明できません。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 DelegationContract-grants-DelegatedAuthority（grants）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms DelegationContract-grants-DelegatedAuthority (grants) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は DelegationContract-grants-DelegatedAuthority（grants）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 DelegationContract-grants-DelegatedAuthority 的 predicate 为 grants，方向为 DelegationContract → DelegatedAuthority，relation kind 为 governance，layout role 为 primary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 DelegationContract→DelegatedAuthority、predicate=grants、relation kind=governance、layout role=primary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation DelegationContract-grants-DelegatedAuthority has predicate grants, direction DelegationContract → DelegatedAuthority, relation kind governance, layout role primary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction DelegationContract->DelegatedAuthority, predicate=grants, relation kind=governance, layout role=primary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 DelegationContract-grants-DelegatedAuthority の predicate が grants、方向が DelegationContract → DelegatedAuthority、relation kind が governance、layout role が primary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 DelegationContract→DelegatedAuthority、predicate=grants、relation kind=governance、layout role=primary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: DelegationContract-grants-DelegatedAuthority 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for DelegationContract-grants-DelegatedAuthority were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: DelegationContract-grants-DelegatedAuthority の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

definitions.zh: 委派事件启动、更新、取消或完成委派过程。
definitions.en: A delegation event starts, updates, cancels, or completes a delegation process.
definitions.ja: 委任イベントは委任プロセスを開始、更新、取消、完了する。

descriptions.zh: 在合成运行 DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess-scenario-001 中，DelegationEvent 通过“changes”明确指向 DelegationProcess；记录保留 source→target 方向、谓词和限定条件。 审查定义：委派事件启动、更新、取消或完成委派过程。
descriptions.en: In synthetic run DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess-scenario-001, DelegationEvent explicitly changes DelegationProcess; the assertion preserves its source-to-target direction, predicate, and qualifiers. Reviewed definition: A delegation event starts, updates, cancels, or completes a delegation process.

descriptions.zh: DelegationEvent 与 DelegationProcess 同时出现但没有可验证的“changes”断言；仅共现不能建立该关系。 审查定义：委派事件启动、更新、取消或完成委派过程。
descriptions.en: DelegationEvent and DelegationProcess co-occur without a verifiable changes assertion; co-occurrence alone does not establish this relation. Reviewed definition: A delegation event starts, updates, cancels, or completes a delegation process.
