decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess（changes）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess (changes) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess（changes）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess 的 predicate 为 changes，方向为 DelegationEvent → DelegationProcess，relation kind 为 temporal，layout role 为 primary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 DelegationEvent→DelegationProcess、predicate=changes、relation kind=temporal、layout role=primary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess has predicate changes, direction DelegationEvent → DelegationProcess, relation kind temporal, layout role primary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction DelegationEvent->DelegationProcess, predicate=changes, relation kind=temporal, layout role=primary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess の predicate が changes、方向が DelegationEvent → DelegationProcess、relation kind が temporal、layout role が primary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 DelegationEvent→DelegationProcess、predicate=changes、relation kind=temporal、layout role=primary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: v3 依据显式关系决策确认 canonical 方向与默认逻辑骨架职责。
change_note.en: v3 confirmed canonical direction and default logical-backbone responsibility from explicit relation decisions.
change_note.ja: v3 は明示的な関係判断に基づき canonical 方向と既定論理バックボーン責務を確認しました。

definitions.zh: 委派事件记录该事件使哪一委派阶段生效，从而让阶段历史可查询且不把事件误作阶段子类。
definitions.en: A delegation event records which delegation phase it made effective, making phase history queryable without classifying an event as a phase subtype.
definitions.ja: 委任イベントはどの委任段階を有効にしたかを記録し、イベントを段階の下位型とせずに段階履歴を照会可能にします。

definitions.en: delegation ownership is a kind of coordination ownership record. Reviewed differentia: DelegationOwnership is a CoordinationOwnershipRecord describing the responsibility split between delegator and delegatee.
definitions.ja: 委任帰属 は 調整帰属記録 の一種です。審査済みの種差：DelegationOwnership は委任者と委任先の責任分担を記述する CoordinationOwnershipRecord である。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 DelegationProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess（is a）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms DelegationProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess (is a) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は DelegationProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess（is a）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 DelegationProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess 的 predicate 为 is_a，方向为 DelegationProcess → CollaborationProcess，relation kind 为 hierarchy，layout role 为 primary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 DelegationProcess→CollaborationProcess、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation DelegationProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess has predicate is_a, direction DelegationProcess → CollaborationProcess, relation kind hierarchy, layout role primary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction DelegationProcess->CollaborationProcess, predicate=is_a, relation kind=hierarchy, layout role=primary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 DelegationProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess の predicate が is_a、方向が DelegationProcess → CollaborationProcess、relation kind が hierarchy、layout role が primary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 DelegationProcess→CollaborationProcess、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: DelegationProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for DelegationProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: DelegationProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

definitions.en: orchestration relation that assigns work to a worker, subagent, route, or tool
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为任务分发，值域为智能体参与者；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域がタスク分配、値域がエージェント参加者です。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。

cardinality_not_applicable_reason.zh: 该本体关系记录可查询的语义事实，但不对所有运行实例施加统一基数。
cardinality_not_applicable_reason.en: This ontology relation records a queryable semantic fact without imposing one universal cardinality on all runtime instances.
cardinality_not_applicable_reason.ja: この本体関係は検索可能な意味事実を記録しますが、すべての実行インスタンスに一律の基数を課しません。

labels.en: is target of distributes task to

authority_basis.zh: TaskDistribution 仍由 orchestration-plane 拥有，AgentActor 仍由 runtime-plane 拥有；该 causal 事实只建立跨域依赖，不转移规范所有权。运行时授权必须由具体 PolicyDecision、AuthorizationGrant 或协议会话证明。
authority_basis.en: TaskDistribution remains owned by orchestration-plane and AgentActor by runtime-plane; this causal fact establishes a cross-Domain dependency without transferring canonical ownership. Runtime authority must be evidenced by a concrete PolicyDecision, AuthorizationGrant, or protocol session.
authority_basis.ja: TaskDistribution は orchestration-plane、AgentActor は runtime-plane に引き続き所有されます。この causal 事実は正規所有権を移さずドメイン横断依存だけを表し、実行時権限には具体的な PolicyDecision、AuthorizationGrant、またはプロトコルセッションの証拠が必要です。

protocol_or_resource_context.zh: 查询必须沿 TaskDistribution → AgentActor 的 canonical ID 与该关系自身的来源主张执行；协议版本、资源标识和信任判定保留在两端节点的信息合同中。
protocol_or_resource_context.en: Queries follow the canonical TaskDistribution → AgentActor assertion and this relation's own source claims; protocol version, resource identity, and trust decisions remain in the endpoint information contracts.
protocol_or_resource_context.ja: 問い合わせは TaskDistribution → AgentActor の canonical ID と当該関係固有の出典主張に従います。プロトコル版、資源識別、信頼判断は両端ノードの情報契約に保持されます。

definitions.zh: 移交事件把后续任务或会话控制权转给一个明确的智能体运行主体，并保留移交范围与时点。
definitions.en: A handoff event transfers subsequent task or conversation control to an identified agent actor while retaining the transfer scope and effective time.
definitions.ja: 引き継ぎイベントは後続タスクまたは会話の制御を識別済みエージェントアクターへ移し、移転範囲と発効時点を保持します。

authority_basis.zh: 控制移交仍由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 唯一拥有，智能体参与者仍由 runtime-actors 唯一拥有；transfers_control_to 只建立跨域事实，不转移定义权。若该事实触发运行操作，还必须引用适用的 PolicyDecision 或 AuthorizationGrant。
authority_basis.en: handoff remains uniquely owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff and agent actor by runtime-actors; transfers_control_to establishes a cross-Domain fact without transferring definitional ownership. If the fact triggers a runtime operation, it must also reference an applicable PolicyDecision or AuthorizationGrant.
authority_basis.ja: ハンドオフは orchestration-delegation-handoff、エージェントアクターは runtime-actors に引き続き一意に所有されます。transfers_control_to は定義所有権を移さずドメイン横断事実だけを確立し、実行操作を起動する場合は適用される PolicyDecision または AuthorizationGrant も参照します。

protocol_or_resource_context.ja: 照会は Handoff-transfers_control_to-AgentActor の source→target 方向、端点 canonical ID、当該関係の出典主張に従い、プロトコル版、資源同一性、信頼判断は元のノードまたは関係に保持されます。

definitions.zh: 移交过程是以转移进行中工作控制权为区分特征的协作过程。
definitions.en: A handoff process is a collaboration process distinguished by transferring control of ongoing work.
definitions.ja: 引き継ぎプロセスは、進行中の作業制御を移すことを種差とする協働プロセスです。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-crewai-docs at locator "Documentation > Agents, tasks, crews, flows, and processes" supports the operational notion for Relation HandoffProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess (is a): HandoffProcess —is_a→ CollaborationProcess means "A handoff process is a collaboration process distinguished by transferring control of ongoing work." Operationally, A handoff process is a collaboration process distinguished by transferring control of ongoing work. decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 HandoffProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess（is a）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms HandoffProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess (is a) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は HandoffProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess（is a）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 HandoffProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess 的 predicate 为 is_a，方向为 HandoffProcess → CollaborationProcess，relation kind 为 hierarchy，layout role 为 primary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 HandoffProcess→CollaborationProcess、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation HandoffProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess has predicate is_a, direction HandoffProcess → CollaborationProcess, relation kind hierarchy, layout role primary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction HandoffProcess->CollaborationProcess, predicate=is_a, relation kind=hierarchy, layout role=primary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 HandoffProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess の predicate が is_a、方向が HandoffProcess → CollaborationProcess、relation kind が hierarchy、layout role が primary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 HandoffProcess→CollaborationProcess、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: HandoffProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for HandoffProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: HandoffProcess-is_a-CollaborationProcess の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: v3 依据显式关系决策确认 canonical 方向与默认逻辑骨架职责。
change_note.en: v3 confirmed canonical direction and default logical-backbone responsibility from explicit relation decisions.
change_note.ja: v3 は明示的な関係判断に基づき canonical 方向と既定論理バックボーン責務を確認しました。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 InitiationPhase-is_a-DelegationPhase（is a）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms InitiationPhase-is_a-DelegationPhase (is a) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は InitiationPhase-is_a-DelegationPhase（is a）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 InitiationPhase-is_a-DelegationPhase 的 predicate 为 is_a，方向为 InitiationPhase → DelegationPhase，relation kind 为 hierarchy，layout role 为 primary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 InitiationPhase→DelegationPhase、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation InitiationPhase-is_a-DelegationPhase has predicate is_a, direction InitiationPhase → DelegationPhase, relation kind hierarchy, layout role primary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction InitiationPhase->DelegationPhase, predicate=is_a, relation kind=hierarchy, layout role=primary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 InitiationPhase-is_a-DelegationPhase の predicate が is_a、方向が InitiationPhase → DelegationPhase、relation kind が hierarchy、layout role が primary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 InitiationPhase→DelegationPhase、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

descriptions.zh: TaskDistribution 与 DelegationProcess 同时出现但没有可验证的“是一种”断言；仅共现不能建立该关系。 审查定义：任务分发 是一种 委派过程。区分特征：任务分发是把工作项分配给选定执行者并保留范围证据的一种委派过程。
descriptions.en: TaskDistribution and DelegationProcess co-occur without a verifiable is a assertion; co-occurrence alone does not establish this relation. Reviewed definition: task distribution is a kind of delegation process. Reviewed differentia: TaskDistribution is a DelegationProcess distinguished by assigning work items to selected performers with scope evidence.
descriptions.ja: TaskDistribution と DelegationProcess は同時に現れますが、検証可能な「の一種である」アサーションがなく、共起だけではこの関係を成立させません。 審査済み定義：タスク分配 は 委任プロセス の一種です。審査済みの種差：TaskDistribution は範囲証拠を保持して作業項目を選択された実行者へ割り当てる DelegationProcess である。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 TaskDistribution-is_a-WorkerAssignment（is a）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms TaskDistribution-is_a-WorkerAssignment (is a) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は TaskDistribution-is_a-WorkerAssignment（is a）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 TaskDistribution-is_a-WorkerAssignment 的 predicate 为 is_a，方向为 TaskDistribution → WorkerAssignment，relation kind 为 hierarchy，layout role 为 primary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 TaskDistribution→WorkerAssignment、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation TaskDistribution-is_a-WorkerAssignment has predicate is_a, direction TaskDistribution → WorkerAssignment, relation kind hierarchy, layout role primary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction TaskDistribution->WorkerAssignment, predicate=is_a, relation kind=hierarchy, layout role=primary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 TaskDistribution-is_a-WorkerAssignment の predicate が is_a、方向が TaskDistribution → WorkerAssignment、relation kind が hierarchy、layout role が primary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 TaskDistribution→WorkerAssignment、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: TaskDistribution-is_a-WorkerAssignment 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for TaskDistribution-is_a-WorkerAssignment were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: TaskDistribution-is_a-WorkerAssignment の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

cardinality_not_applicable_reason.zh: 该语义事实不对所有运行实例施加统一基数。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-crewai-docs at locator "Documentation > Agents, tasks, crews, flows, and processes" supports the operational notion for Relation WorkerAssignment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess (phase of): WorkerAssignment —phase_of→ WorkerSelectionProcess means "Worker assignment activity is an auditable phase of worker selection." Operationally, Worker assignment activity is an auditable phase of worker selection. The canonical direction, owner orchestration-delegation-handoff, relation kind temporal, and layout role secondary-backbone are Moonweave design inference choices; the source does not assert those ontology decisions.

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 WorkerAssignment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess（phase of）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms WorkerAssignment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess (phase of) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は WorkerAssignment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess（phase of）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 WorkerAssignment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 的 predicate 为 phase_of，方向为 WorkerAssignment → WorkerSelectionProcess，relation kind 为 temporal，layout role 为 secondary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 WorkerAssignment→WorkerSelectionProcess、predicate=phase_of、relation kind=temporal、layout role=secondary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation WorkerAssignment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess has predicate phase_of, direction WorkerAssignment → WorkerSelectionProcess, relation kind temporal, layout role secondary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction WorkerAssignment->WorkerSelectionProcess, predicate=phase_of, relation kind=temporal, layout role=secondary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 WorkerAssignment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess の predicate が phase_of、方向が WorkerAssignment → WorkerSelectionProcess、relation kind が temporal、layout role が secondary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 WorkerAssignment→WorkerSelectionProcess、predicate=phase_of、relation kind=temporal、layout role=secondary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: WorkerAssignment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for WorkerAssignment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: WorkerAssignment-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: v3 依据显式关系决策确认 canonical 方向与默认逻辑骨架职责。
change_note.en: v3 confirmed canonical direction and default logical-backbone responsibility from explicit relation decisions.
change_note.ja: v3 は明示的な関係判断に基づき canonical 方向と既定論理バックボーン責務を確認しました。

descriptions.zh: WorkerSelection 与 WorkerPool 同时出现但没有可验证的“selects worker from pool”断言；仅共现不能建立该关系。 审查定义：工作者选择关系把选择决策连接到候选工作者池，从中选择子智能体、模型、工具或受托方。
descriptions.en: WorkerSelection and WorkerPool co-occur without a verifiable selects worker from pool assertion; co-occurrence alone does not establish this relation. Reviewed definition: links a worker-selection decision to the candidate worker pool from which a subagent, model, tool, or delegate is chosen.
descriptions.ja: WorkerSelection と WorkerPool は同時に現れますが、検証可能な「selects worker from pool」アサーションがなく、共起だけではこの関係を成立させません。 審査済み定義：作業者選択関係は、選択決定を候補作業者プールへ結び、そこからサブエージェント、モデル、道具、受任者を選びます。

expected_result.zh: 验证器不得把该对象归类为selects worker from pool。
expected_result.en: Validation must not classify the object as selects worker from pool.
expected_result.ja: 検証器はこの対象をselects worker from poolとして分類してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 相关性或共享上位概念不足以证明严格的概念成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: Relatedness or a shared broader concept is insufficient for strict concept membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 関連性または共通の上位概念だけでは、厳密な概念所属を証明できません。

deprecation_reason.zh: WorkerSelection 是选择完成时的事件；可用性评估和候选选择由相应活动执行。
deprecation_reason.en: WorkerSelection is the event that records completion of selection; availability assessment and candidate choice are performed by their activities.
deprecation_reason.ja: WorkerSelection は選択完了を記録するイベントであり、可用性評価と候補選択は対応する活動が実行します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess（phase of）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess (phase of) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess（phase of）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 的 predicate 为 phase_of，方向为 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity → WorkerSelectionProcess，relation kind 为 temporal，layout role 为 cross-link，并满足“canonical 方向 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity→WorkerSelectionProcess、predicate=phase_of、relation kind=temporal、layout role=cross-link”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess has predicate phase_of, direction WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity → WorkerSelectionProcess, relation kind temporal, layout role cross-link, and invariants “canonical direction WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity->WorkerSelectionProcess, predicate=phase_of, relation kind=temporal, layout role=cross-link”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess の predicate が phase_of、方向が WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity → WorkerSelectionProcess、relation kind が temporal、layout role が cross-link であり、「canonical 方向 WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity→WorkerSelectionProcess、predicate=phase_of、relation kind=temporal、layout role=cross-link」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: WorkerSelectionDecisionActivity-phase_of-WorkerSelectionProcess の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool（uses）由 orchestration-delegation-handoff 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由一次工作者选择、委派契约、发起接受撤销完成阶段，或控制和责任的转移决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool (uses) is owned by orchestration-delegation-handoff for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by one worker selection, delegation contract, initiation/acceptance/revocation/completion phase, or transfer of control or responsibility.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool（uses）を orchestration-delegation-handoff が「対象の同一性が一回の作業者選択、委任契約、開始・受諾・取消・完了段階、または制御・責任移転で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool 的 predicate 为 uses，方向为 WorkerSelectionProcess → WorkerPool，relation kind 为 information，layout role 为 primary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 WorkerSelectionProcess→WorkerPool、predicate=uses、relation kind=information、layout role=primary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool has predicate uses, direction WorkerSelectionProcess → WorkerPool, relation kind information, layout role primary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction WorkerSelectionProcess->WorkerPool, predicate=uses, relation kind=information, layout role=primary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool の predicate が uses、方向が WorkerSelectionProcess → WorkerPool、relation kind が information、layout role が primary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 WorkerSelectionProcess→WorkerPool、predicate=uses、relation kind=information、layout role=primary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: WorkerSelectionProcess-uses-WorkerPool の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: v3 依据显式关系决策确认 canonical 方向与默认逻辑骨架职责。
change_note.en: v3 confirmed canonical direction and default logical-backbone responsibility from explicit relation decisions.
